steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
The glass volume formula from the figure is $V = \dfrac{7\pi k^3}{48}$, and the glass holds $473$ cubic centimeters. So:
$$\frac{7\pi k^3}{48} = 473$$

steps.title: Solve for $k^3$
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $48$:
$$7\pi k^3 = 22{,}704$$
Divide by $7\pi$:
$$k^3 = \frac{22{,}704}{7\pi} \approx 1{,}032.6$$

steps.title: Take the cube root and check each choice
steps.content:
$$k = \sqrt[3]{1{,}032.6} \approx 10.11$$
  • A) $2.52$: $(2.52)^3 \approx 16$, giving $V \approx 7.3$. Way too small. Eliminate.
  • B) $7.67$: $(7.67)^3 \approx 451$, giving $V \approx 207$. Too small. Eliminate.
  • C) $7.79$: $(7.79)^3 \approx 473$, but plugging in gives $V \approx 217$, not $473$. Eliminate.
  • D) $10.11$: $(10.11)^3 \approx 1{,}033$, giving $V \approx 473$. Match.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
